scenarios.description: children() returns empty list via childNodeSize()==0 shortcut after cache rebuild and node removal
scenarios.precondition: Element has had children then emptied (cache invalidated)
pseudocode: TEST TC07 children empty after removal
el.empty();                         // clear childNodes and invalidate cache

scenarios.description: children() rebuilds list when shadowChildrenRef exists but referent has been cleared
scenarios.precondition: Element with one child element and manual nullification of shadowChildrenRef referent
scenarios.expectedResult: returns new list containing the child element
pseudocode: TEST TC08 children rebuild on GC-cleared shadowChildrenRef
